Campaign_ID: Unique identifier for each marketing campaign carried out by Elexion Automotive.
Campaign_Year: The year in which the specific marketing campaign was executed.
Campaign_Type: The type of marketing campaign that was executed such as digital, print, TV etc.
Campaign_Budget: The total budget that was allocated for the marketing campaign.
Campaign_Outcome: The outcome or result of the marketing campaign. This could be measured in terms of reach, conversions, sales etc.
